recommendations.title: Ordinary Love
recommendations.overview: An extraordinary look at the lives of a middle-aged couple in the midst of the wife's breast cancer diagnosis.

recommendations.title: Good Vibrations
recommendations.overview: The story of music legend Terri Hooley, a key figure in Belfast's punk rock scene. Hooley founded the Good Vibrations store from which a record label sprung, representing bands such as The Undertones, Rudi and The Outcasts.

recommendations.title: La Haine
recommendations.overview: After a chaotic night of rioting in a marginal suburb of Paris, three young friends, Vinz, Hubert and Saïd, wander around unoccupied waiting for news about the state of health of a mutual friend who has been seriously injured when confronting the pol

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - Papa est en haut
recommendations.overview: Dans ce spectacle, mis en scène par sa soeur Judith Elmaleh, il parle de son enfance, de son fils et de son père ; 750 000 places seront vendus.

recommendations.title: Cassandro
recommendations.overview: The true story of Saúl Armendáriz, a gay amateur wrestler from El Paso that rises to international stardom after he creates the character Cassandro, the “Liberace of Lucha Libre.” In the process, he upends not just the macho wrestling world but also

recommendations.title: Don't Be Bad
recommendations.overview: A story set in the 90s and in the outskirts of Rome to Ostia. A world where money, luxury cars, night clubs, cocaine and synthetic drugs are easy to run. A world in which Vittorio and Cesare, in their early twenties, act in search of their success.

recommendations.title: Amber Alert
recommendations.overview: A ride-share turns into a high-stakes game of cat and mouse after it follows a car fitting the description of an AMBER Alert.

recommendations.title: IF
recommendations.overview: After discovering she can see everyone's imaginary friends, a girl embarks on a magical adventure to reconnect forgotten imaginary friends with their kids.

recommendations.title: Fire Island
recommendations.overview: A group of queer best friends gather in the Fire Island Pines for their annual week of love and laughter. However, desires, dramas, drink and drugs push their bonds to the limits.

recommendations.title: Jesus
recommendations.overview: Three and a half years of Jesus' ministry, as told in the Gospel of Luke.
